text: Welcome, helper_alex! You’re approved as moderator. Please review the community rules and moderation guidelines, and thanks for helping keep things running smoothly.
Welcome, guide_sam! You’re approved as event_helper. Glad to have you onboard—please check the event helper guide and community rules when you get a moment.
Welcome, mentor_lina! You’re approved as mentor. Thanks for joining—please take a look at the mentoring expectations and community rules before you jump in.
